title: Chump CAPABILITIES_REGISTRY.json schema (INFRA-1729)
description: Machine-readable inventory of repository primitives (CLI commands, ambient event kinds, public crate APIs, MCP tools, skills, scripts). Produced by scripts/dev/build-capabilities-registry.sh against the current repo, or by scripts/ops/generate-capabilities-registry.sh <repo-path> against an arbitrary repo (the Column A `chump ingest` Quartermaster artifact). External agents (Cannon, Choreographer, Content Bots) declare this file as their tool-discovery input — replaces grep-and-pray primitive discovery.

repo.description: Repository identifier (e.g. 'repairman29/chump' or basename of the target path when no GitHub remote is configured).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this registry was generated.

generator_version.description: Generator commit SHA or version tag — lets consumers detect stale registries after a generator-format bump.

cli_commands.description: Top-level CLI commands exposed by the repo's main binary (parsed from --help recursively).

event_kinds.description: Ambient event kinds registered in docs/observability/EVENT_REGISTRY.yaml.

crate_apis.description: Public APIs of every top-level crate (extracted from crates/*/src/lib.rs via the chump-ast-crawler).

kind.description: fn / struct / enum / trait / mod / const / type

mcp_tools.description: MCP tools — sourced from chump-mcp.json server descriptors plus #[chump_tool] macro annotations in src/.

primitives.description: Flattened canonical list (AC #1). Every CLI/MCP-tool/skill/crate/script entry is also represented here with the canonical schema. Consumers that want a single iteration target read this; consumers that want kind-specific lists read cli_commands/event_kinds/crate_apis/mcp_tools.

when_to_use.description: One-line trigger hint, curated via docs/CAPABILITIES_OVERLAY.yaml.

version.description: semver or git-sha when the primitive's contract last changed.
